live_matches.match_title: Real Kashmir FC vs Gokulam Kerala FC - 30 Apr 2026
live_matches.description: Real Kashmir FC take on Gokulam Kerala FC in an exciting Star Cement Indian Football League 2025-26 clash, with both sides aiming to strengthen their position in the standings. Real Kashmir will look to make the most of home conditions, while Gokulam Kerala aim to continue their attacking momentum in what promises to be a competitive encounter. Tune in to catch all the action from Star Cement Indian Football League 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
